fullArticle:
Publisher THQ Nordic and developer Ashborne Games have delayed the Early Access launch of The Guild: Europa 1410 from its previously planned July 16 release date to September. It will be available for PC via Steam.

Here is the full message from THQ Nordic on the delay:

First of all, a big “Thank you!” goes out to all players who checked out the demo of The Guild: Europa 1410 during Steam Next Fest. Out of more than 4,000 demos featured, The Guild: Europa 1410 was the 25th most played one—that is amazing! We saw tens of thousands of aspiring medieval tycoons get ready to start their businesses and lay the foundations of a dynasty that spans generations.

We’re equally grateful for the detailed, extensive feedback that thousands of you shared with us. It’s already helping us understand eve...
